License
=======

HalogenGroups / PFASGroups is licensed under the
**Creative Commons Attribution-NoDerivatives 4.0 International (CC BY-ND 4.0)**
license.

.. image:: https://img.shields.io/badge/License-CC%20BY--ND%204.0-lightgrey.svg
   :target: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nd/4.0/
   :alt: License: CC BY-ND 4.0

Summary
-------

You are **free** to:

- **Share** — copy and redistribute the material in any medium or format for
  any purpose, even commercially.

**Under the following terms:**

- **Attribution** — You must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the
  license, and indicate if changes were made.  You may do so in any reasonable
  manner, but not in any way that suggests the licensor endorses you or your use.
- **NoDerivatives** — If you remix, transform, or build upon the material, you
  may **not** distribute the modified material.

No additional restrictions — You may not apply legal terms or technological
measures that legally restrict others from doing anything the license permits.

Full license text
-----------------

The full license text is available at
https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nd/4.0/legalcode

and is included in the source repository as ``LICENSE``.

Citation
--------

If you use HalogenGroups / PFASGroups in your research, please cite:

   Miaz, L.T., Cousins, I.T. (2026). Automatic Detection and Classification
   of Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances Using SMARTS-Based Halogen Group
   Matching. *Journal of Cheminformatics* (in preparation).
